AdminFeatures.description: Special:Admin feature flags. Array of any of: `refresh`, `setup`, `disposal`, `pstats`, `fullt`, `maintenance-script-docs`, `show-overview`, `alert-last-optimization-run`. Legacy `SMW_ADM_*` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

AllowRecursiveExport.description: When `true`, normal users can request recursive OWL/RDF exports.

AutoRefreshOnPageMove.description: When `true`, refreshes semantic data in the store when a page is moved.

AutoRefreshOnPurge.description: When `true`, refreshes semantic data in the store when a page is manually purged.

AutoRefreshSubject.description: When `true`, refreshes the semantic store for pages that are edited.

ChangePropagationProtection.description: When `true`, protects an active change propagation from being disabled without administrative intervention.

BrowseFeatures.description: Special:Browse feature flags. Array of any of: `toolbox-link`, `show-inverse`, `show-incoming`, `show-group`, `show-sortkey`, `use-api`. Legacy `SMW_BROWSE_*` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

CacheUsage.description: Defines time to live for in Semantic MediaWiki used cache instances.

ChangePropagationWatchlist.description: Property IDs that trigger full re-processing of dependent pages when their values change.

CategoryFeatures.description: Category feature flags. Array of any of: `redirect`, `instance`, `hierarchy`. Legacy `SMW_CAT_*` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

CheckForConstraintErrors.description: Property-constraint error checking. Accepts `false` (= `SMW_CONSTRAINT_ERR_CHECK_NONE`, off), `"check/main"` (= `SMW_CONSTRAINT_ERR_CHECK_MAIN`, main-data-only), or `"check/all"` (= `SMW_CONSTRAINT_ERR_CHECK_ALL`, all entities). The `SMW_CONSTRAINT_ERR_CHECK_*` constants resolve to these string values and continue to work.

CheckForRemnantEntities.description: Controls when remnant entity checks run: `"purge"` (on purge only), `true` (every update), or `false` (disabled).

CompactLinkSupport.description: When `true`, encodes and compresses Special:Browse / Special:Ask / Special:SearchByProperty links to reduce URL length.

ConfigFileDir.description: Deprecated since 7.0.0; will be removed in 8.0.0. Install-state metadata is now stored in the `smw_meta` database table. This setting is kept only so that the one-shot migration of any pre-existing `.smw.json` file can find its source location. Historical default: the extension root; sites that overrode it (for example to `$wgUploadDirectory`) must keep the override in place until `update.php` has run once and migrated the file to `.smw.json.migrated`.

CreateProtectionRight.description: User right required to create new properties; `false` disables creation protection.

DataTypePropertyExemptionList.description: DataTypes exempted from the automatic corresponding-property registration.

DVFeatures.description: DataValue feature flags. Array of any of: `provider-redirect`, `monolingual-langcode`, `number-value-usespaces`, `pattern-validation`, `wpv-display-title`, `provider-display-title`, `unique-constraint`, `time-calendar-model`, `preferred-label`, `provider-link-hint`, `wpv-pipetrick`. Legacy `SMW_DV_*` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

DefaultLoggerRole.description: Logging granularity role (`developer`, `user`, or `production`); controls which SMW events are written to the debug log.

DefaultNumRecurringEvents.description: Default number of recurring-event instances generated when no end date is set.

DefaultOutputFormatters.description: Default output formatter overrides keyed by type ID, type name, or property name.

DefaultStore.description: Default storage backend class; `SQLStore::class` evaluates to this fully-qualified string at compile time.

DeprecationNotices.description: Registry of deprecation notices shown in the Special:Admin "Deprecation notices" panel.

DetectOutdatedData.description: When `true`, verifies semantic data is up to date with the latest revision on every page load.

Dir.description: Alias for `smwgIP`; resolves to the extension root directory. Provided for readability in code that does not use `smwgIP` directly.

EditProtectionRight.description: User right required to edit pages protected via `Is edit protected`; `false` disables the feature.

ElasticsearchEndpoints.description: ElasticSearch node endpoint definitions (host/port/scheme objects or `host:port` strings).

ElasticsearchProfile.description: Path to a JSON profile that overrides `smwgElasticsearchConfig` values; `false` disables profile loading.

EnabledDeferredUpdate.description: When `true`, defers store updates via MediaWiki's `DeferredUpdates` mechanism.

EnabledEditPageHelp.description: When `true`, displays SMW help information on the edit page.

EnabledFulltextSearch.description: When `true`, stores text in a separate fulltext-indexed table for SQL fulltext operations.

EnabledQueryDependencyLinksStore.description: When `true`, stores query dependencies to enable parser-cache invalidation when queried entities change.

EnabledSpecialPage.description: Special pages on which SMW annotation and content processing is enabled.

EnableExportRDFLink.description: When `true`, adds a `Special:ExportRDF` `<link>` element to every page `<head>`.

EnableUpdateJobs.description: When `false`, disables MediaWiki job-queue updates triggered by semantic data changes.

EntityCollation.description: Collation strategy for entity sort values; must match `$wgCategoryCollation`; changes require running `updateEntityCollation.php`.

ExportBacklinks.description: When `true`, backlinks are included by default in OWL/RDF exports.

ExportBCAuxiliaryUse.description: BC: when `true`, retains the legacy `aux`-marker URIs in RDF/Turtle exports.

ExportBCNonCanonicalFormUse.description: BC: when `true`, uses localized rather than canonical identifiers in RDF/Query statements.

ExportResourcesAsIri.description: When `true`, resources are exported as IRIs (RFC 3987) instead of ASCII-encoded URIs.

ExperimentalFeatures.description: Experimental feature flags. Array of any of: `queryresult-prefetch`, `showparser-curtailment`. Legacy `SMW_QUERYRESULT_*` / `SMW_SHOWPARSER_*` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

ExtraneousLanguageFileDir.description: Directory containing SMW-specific i18n files for extraneous language data (unit labels, property aliases, etc.).

FactboxFeatures.description: Factbox feature flags. Array of any of: 'cache', 'purge-refresh', 'display-subobject', 'display-attachment'. Legacy `SMW_FACTBOX_*` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

FallbackSearchType.description: Search engine class to fall back to when SMWSearch cannot parse a query; `null` uses the database default.

FieldTypeFeatures.description: SQLStore field-type modifications. `false` (= `SMW_FIELDT_NONE`) disables all flags and skips field-type registration entirely; an array of `"char-nocase"` and/or `"char-long"` enables case-insensitive collation / extended field width respectively. Legacy `SMW_FIELDT_*` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

FixedProperties.description: Properties managed in their own fixed database table for sharding large value sets.

FulltextDeferredUpdate.description: When `true`, defers fulltext index updates to a background process decoupled from the storage update.

FulltextLanguageDetection.description: Language-detector configurations for fulltext indexing; empty disables language detection.

FulltextSearchIndexableDataTypes.description: DataTypes whose values are eligible for fulltext indexing. Array of any of: `blob`, `uri`, `wikipage`. Legacy `SMW_FT_*` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

FulltextSearchMinTokenSize.description: Minimum token length used to decide between MATCH and LIKE operators in fulltext conditions.

FulltextSearchPropertyExemptionList.description: Property keys excluded from fulltext indexing; LIKE/NLIKE is used for these instead.

IgnoreExtensionRegistrationCheck.description: When `true`, suppresses the check that verifies the extension was correctly registered via `wfLoadExtension`.

IgnoreQueryErrors.description: When `true`, queries execute even if errors were detected during parsing.

IgnoreUpgradeKeyCheck.description: When `true`, bypasses the `SetupCheck` and `MaintenanceCheck` gates that block execution when the schema is in an intermediate state.

ImportFileDirs.description: Directories from which SMW reads import-content definitions; users add their own vocabularies by adding entries.

ImportPerformers.description: Users reserved exclusively for the import task; they may lock content from alteration by others.

ImportReqVersion.description: Import-file version required for content to be imported during setup; set to `false` to disable import.

IP.description: Path to the SMW extension root directory as seen on the local filesystem. Used to resolve PHP file paths within the extension.

JobQueueWatchlist.description: Job types shown in the personal-bar job-queue watchlist; empty disables the feature.

MandatorySubpropertyParentTypeInheritanc.description: When `true`, enforces type inheritance between a parent property and its subproperties.

MaxNonExpNumber.description: Largest number displayed without scientific notation.

MaxNumRecurringEvents.description: Maximum number of recurring-event instances that can be defined regardless of end date.

MaxPropertyValues.description: Maximum number of property values displayed per property on a page's Property page.

Namespace.description: URI/IRI namespace for OWL/RDF export resources; auto-derived from the wiki URL when `null`.

PageSpecialProperties.description: Special properties automatically tracked and stored for pages (e.g. modification date).

PagingLimit.description: Number of results shown in the listings on pages in the Property and Concept namespaces as well as other services that require a limit.

PDefaultType.description: Internal type ID assumed for properties that have no explicit type declaration; defaults to `Type:Page`.

PlainList.description: When `true`, `format=list` produces plain lists without HTML markup, restoring pre-3.0 behaviour.

ParserFeatures.description: Parser feature flags. Array of any of: `strict`, `unstrip`, `inline-errors`, `hidden-categories`, `links-in-values`. Legacy `SMW_PARSER_*` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

PostEditUpdate.description: Regulates task specific settings for the post-edit process.

PropertyInvalidCharacterList.description: Characters considered invalid in property labels; annotations using them produce an error.

PropertyLowUsageThreshold.description: Usage count below which a property is highlighted as "hardly used" on Special:Properties.

PropertyReservedNameList.description: Names reserved as property names because they interfere with SMW or MediaWiki internals.

PropertyRetiredList.description: Property prefixes / IDs marked as retired and eligible for removal from the entity table.

PropertyZeroCountDisplay.description: When `true`, properties with zero usage are shown on Special:Properties.

QComparators.description: Pipe-delimited list of comparator operators supported in queries.

QConceptCacheLifetime.description: Concept cache lifetime in minutes; SMW recomputes an older cache if this threshold is exceeded.

QConceptCaching.description: Concept-cache use policy. Accepts `"none"`, `"hard"`, or `"all"`. Legacy `CONCEPT_CACHE_*` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

QConceptMaxDepth.description: Maximum property-chain depth for a concept query.

QConceptMaxSize.description: Maximum number of conditions permitted in a concept query.

QConceptFeatures.description: Query feature flags applied to concept-page query parsing. Array of any of: `property`, `category`, `concept`, `namespace`, `conjunction`, `disjunction`. Legacy `SMW_*_QUERY` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

QDefaultLimit.description: Default number of result rows returned by an inline query.

QDefaultLinking.description: Default linking behaviour for query results; one of `none`, `subject`, or `all`.

QDefaultNamespaces.description: Default namespaces searched by queries; `null` disables namespace restrictions for faster queries.

QEnabled.description: Master switch to enable or disable all query-related features and interfaces.

QEqualitySupport.description: Inverse / equality property handling: `"none"` disables, `"some"` enables redirects (default), `"full"` enables redirects and owl:sameAs. Legacy `SMW_EQ_*` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

QExpensiveExecutionLimit.description: Maximum number of expensive `#ask` / `#show` calls per page; `false` means no limit.

QExpensiveThreshold.description: Time in seconds above which a `#ask` / `#show` call is classified as expensive.

QFeatures.description: Query feature flags. Array of any of: `property`, `category`, `concept`, `namespace`, `conjunction`, `disjunction`. Each enables the matching query type in inline queries; removing one disables it (e.g. drop `disjunction` to forbid OR clauses). Legacy `SMW_*_QUERY` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

QFilterDuplicates.description: When `true`, filters duplicate query segments from the query build process (experimental).

QMaxDepth.description: Maximum property-chain depth of a query.

QMaxInlineLimit.description: Maximum number of result rows printed by a single inline query on a page.

QMaxLimit.description: Maximum number of results ever retrieved, even on special query pages.

QMaxSize.description: Maximum number of conditions permitted in a single query.

QPrintoutLimit.description: Maximum number of printout columns (`?`-statements) supported in a single query.

QSortFeatures.description: Sort feature flags. Array of any of: `sort` (allow sorting), `random` (allow random ordering), `unconditional` (allow unconditional sort). Legacy `SMW_QSORT*` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

QSubcategoryDepth.description: Maximum depth for sub-category inclusion steps within the category hierarchy.

QSubpropertyDepth.description: Maximum depth for sub-property inclusion steps within the property hierarchy.

QTemporaryTablesAutoCommitMode.description: When `true`, forces auto-commit for temporary tables to work around MySQL GTID restrictions.

QueryDependencyPropertyExemptionList.description: Property keys excluded from query-dependency detection to avoid spurious cache purges.

QueryProfiler.description: Query profiler. Accepts `false` to disable profiling entirely, `[]` for basic profiling, or an array of any of `parameters`, `duration` for granular detail fields. Note that `[]` enables basic profiling (it does NOT disable); use `false` to disable. Legacy `true` (alias for `[]`) and `SMW_QPRFL_*` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

QueryResultCacheLifetime.description: Lifetime in seconds for embedded query result caches; default one week.

QueryResultCacheRefreshOnPurge.description: When `true`, embedded query result caches are invalidated when an `action=purge` event fires.

QueryResultNonEmbeddedCacheLifetime.description: Lifetime in seconds for non-embedded (Special:Ask, API) query result caches; `0` disables.

QuerySources.description: Available external query sources; unknown sources fall back to the local wiki.

QUpperbound.description: Maximum rows printable in an inline query when an offset is applied.

QUseLegacyQuery.description: When `true`, reverts to the pre-7.x `SELECT DISTINCT` query shape instead of the derived-table rewrite.

RemoteReqFeatures.description: Remote-query feature flags. Array of any of: `send-response` (allow the remote wiki to respond to a query), `show-note` (display a hint when the result came from a remote source). Legacy `SMW_REMOTE_REQ_*` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

ResultFormatsFeatures.description: Result-formatter feature. Accepts `"none"` or `"template-outsep"`. Legacy `SMW_RF_*` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

SearchByPropertyFuzzy.description: Type IDs for which Special:SearchByProperty displays nearby fuzzy results when exact matches are few.

ServicesFileDir.description: Directory containing SMW service-wiring files loaded by the dependency injection container.

SetParserCacheKeys.description: Session keys added to the parser cache key, each causing additional cache fragmentation.

SetParserCacheTimestamp.description: When `true`, sets a timestamp on `ParserOutput` to allow immediate parser-cache invalidation.

ShowFactbox.description: Default factbox visibility on page view. Accepts 'hidden', 'special', 'nonempty', or 'shown'. Legacy `SMW_FACTBOX_HIDDEN`/`SPECIAL`/`NONEMPTY`/`SHOWN` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

ShowFactboxEdit.description: Factbox visibility on the edit form. Accepts the same values as `smwgShowFactbox`. Legacy `SMW_FACTBOX_*` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

SimilarityLookupExemptionProperty.description: Property whose annotation exempts a property from the similarity lookup.

SparqlCustomConnector.description: Custom SPARQL repository connector class used when `smwgSparqlRepositoryConnector` is set to `custom`.

SparqlEndpoint.description: Configure SPARQL database connection for Semantic MediaWiki.

SparqlDefaultGraph.description: Default graph URI for the SPARQL repository, analogous to a database name in relational stores.

SparqlQFeatures.description: SPARQL query feature flags. Array of any of: `redirects`, `subproperties`, `subcategories`, `collation`, `no-case`. Legacy `SMW_SPARQL_QF_*` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

SparqlReplicationPropertyExemptionList.description: Properties exempted from the SPARQL replication process.

SparqlRepositoryConnector.description: Pre-deployed SPARQL repository connector to use (`default`, `4store`, `blazegraph`, `fuseki`, `sesame`, `virtuoso`, or `custom`).

SparqlRepositoryFeatures.description: SPARQL repository feature flags. Accepts `"none"` or `"connection-ping"`. Legacy `SMW_SPARQL_NONE`/`CONNECTION_PING` integer constants are accepted with a deprecation notice in 7.x and will be removed in 8.0.

SpecialAskFormSubmitMethod.description: Form submit method on Special:Ask. Accepts `"get"`, `"get.redirect"`, or `"post"`. The `SMW_SASK_SUBMIT_*` constants resolve to these string values and continue to work.

Translate.description: (Disabled feature) When `true`, translates browser labels using interwiki links.

UpgradeKey.description: Version key that verifies a correct upgrade path was run against the DB schema.

URITypeSchemeList.description: URI schemes accepted by the URI datatype.

UseComparableContentHash.description: When `true`, normalises subobject content hashes so property-value order does not affect hash equality.
